nasb.text: “Every vow and every binding oath to humble herself, her husband may confirm it or her husband may annul it.

esv.text: Any vow and any binding oath to afflict herself, her husband may establish, or her husband may make void.

cnv.text: “婦人所許的願和刻苦約束自己所起的誓，她丈夫都可以確立，也可以廢去。

ccb.text: 丈夫有权赞同或反对妻子许的愿或起的誓。
